title: How Facebook's Algorithmic Tweaks Affected Engagement with News URLs over Time
snippet: A liveblog and summary of a conference presentation delivered by Fabio Giglietto at the 2026 International Communication Association (ICA) conference in Cape Town. The coverage details Giglietto's insights on audience partisanship, news quality, and the mechanics of Facebook's algorithmic amplification over a multi-year period.
description: A third-party liveblog and coverage of Fabio Giglietto's presentation at the 2026 ICA conference regarding Facebook's algorithmic amplification and its impact on news URL engagement.

title: Panel – Meta Content Library Community Roundtable: Where to for Social Media Research? – #SMSociety 2026
snippet: A conference announcement listing Fabio Giglietto as a featured speaker on an academic roundtable. The panel focuses on how computational social scientists are adjusting their methodologies for tracking online behavior and public interest research following the shutdown of CrowdTangle and the transition to the Meta Content Library.
description: Fabio Giglietto is featured as a panelist for an academic roundtable at the #SMSociety 2026 conference, discussing the transition from CrowdTangle to the Meta Content Library for computational social science research.

title: SMSociety 2026 Conference Programme – #SMSociety 2026
snippet: The official conference event announcement for the 2026 International Conference on Social Media & Society in Glasgow. Professor Fabio Giglietto is featured as an expert speaker on the roundtable panel titled 'Meta Content Library Community Roundtable: Where to for Social Media Research?'.
description: An announcement for the International Conference on Social Media & Society listing Professor Fabio Giglietto as an expert panelist discussing future pathways for social media research following the closure of CrowdTangle.

title: Indagine urbinate: "Così l’algoritmo influenza il voto" - Il Resto del Carlino

title: Algoritmi e democrazia, il caso Meta secondo lo studio di UniUrb
snippet: This news report outlines the political and legislative reactions triggered by Fabio Giglietto's research paper, 'A Pretty Blunt Approach'. It details how his findings led to a formal inquiry in the European Parliament and were showcased in a prominent episode of the investigative television program 'Report' on Rai3.
description: A news report detailing the political and legislative impact of Fabio Giglietto's research paper, 'A Pretty Blunt Approach', including a formal inquiry in the European Parliament.

title: Facebook, troppa visibilità a estremisti e complottisti: ecco come impatta Meta sulle elezioni
snippet: A detailed journalistic breakdown of Fabio Giglietto's research, illustrating how the algorithmic design of digital platforms limits institutional political communication while inadvertently boosting the visibility of pro-Russia, Eurosceptic, and conspiracy theorist accounts.
description: An article covering Professor Fabio Giglietto's research analyzing over 2.5 million Facebook posts, focusing on how political extremist pages bypassed Meta's filters to gain visibility during elections.

title: Secondo uno studio dell'università di Urbino l'algoritmo di Facebook ora punisce la politica ufficiale e premia gli estremisti antieuropei. Pd e FdI verso una legge bipartisan sulle piattaforme - Open
